items.headline: King Abdulaziz International Airport Operational with Some Flight Delays
items.context: King Abdulaziz International Airport in Jeddah is fully operational, despite some flight delays, serving as a vital gateway for domestic, international, and Umrah-related travel. items.headline: Riyadh's New Black Gold Museum Opens
items.context: The Black Gold Museum in Riyadh has opened, showcasing the legacy of oil through art. The museum is part of the King Abdullah Petroleum Studies and Research Center and is expected to attract tourists and art enthusiasts. The museum's opening highlights Saudi Arabia's efforts to promote its cultural and artistic heritage.
